\tzpentry{ID4591}{Information Measure}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4591 introduces Information Measure as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{I}_{\text{density}} = \log_2(153,600) \approx 17.23 \text{ bits/state transition} \end{equation}
